session.user: Run `npx prettier --write docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md docs/learned/planning/one-shot-workflow.md docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the output. Do not fix anything else, just run and report.
session.assistant: I'll run the prettier command to format those documentation files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run prettier formatting on three documentation files

session.assistant:
prettier passed: All 3 files formatted successfully in 197ms total
**Files formatted:** - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md (75ms) - docs/learned/planning/one-shot-workflow.md (98ms) - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md (24ms)
